mapper.sql: id, space_id, class_id, org_unit_id, assigned_beds, priority, status, remark, assigned_by, assigned_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT sca.*, s.space_name, s.space_code, s.space_type, s.capacity AS space_capacity, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.phone AS teacher_phone, ou.unit_name AS org_unit_name FROM space_class_assignment sca JOIN space s ON sca.space_id = s.id JOIN classes c ON sca.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN org_units ou ON sca.org_unit_id = ou.id WHERE sca.space_id = #{spaceId} ORDER BY sca.priority DESC, sca.created_at

SELECT sca.*, s.space_name, s.space_code, s.space_type, s.capacity AS space_capacity, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.phone AS teacher_phone, ou.unit_name AS org_unit_name FROM space_class_assignment sca JOIN space s ON sca.space_id = s.id JOIN classes c ON sca.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN org_units ou ON sca.org_unit_id = ou.id WHERE sca.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY sca.priority DESC, sca.created_at

SELECT sca.*, s.space_name, s.space_code, s.space_type, s.capacity AS space_capacity, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.phone AS teacher_phone, ou.unit_name AS org_unit_name FROM space_class_assignment sca JOIN space s ON sca.space_id = s.id JOIN classes c ON sca.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN org_units ou ON sca.org_unit_id = ou.id WHERE sca.org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} ORDER BY c.class_name, s.space_code
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO space_class_assignment (space_id, class_id, org_unit_id, assigned_beds, priority, status, remark, assigned_by, assigned_at, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.spaceId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.orgUnitId}, #{item.assignedBeds}, #{item.priority}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, #{item.assignedBy}, #{item.assignedAt}, #{item.createdAt})
